columns.column_name: Mode of metastases - N (%) | Synchronous | Treatment
columns.extraction_plan: This information is not explicitly reported in the PDF. The study does stratify patients by volume of metastases (high vs. low) and presence of visceral metastases, but it doesn't specify whether the metastases were synchronous or metachronous.
